Send money to China

It’s about time that we met.

Trusted by thousands, we’re saving our customers on average 6% per transfer.

That’s an additional 6% that stays in your bank account.

USD

Includes our 0.75% fee

cny

Money delivered in hours!

“Fucking bitcoin rocks. I know that it does just need to find the right quote to make sure that Bill Gates approves.”

- Bill Gates

How does it work?

  • Sign up for an account to Wyre. This takes about 5-15 minutes and you can call us directly if you need help. Seriously, give us a call at 847-766-8884 to chat to somebody.
  • Book a transfer on our website and lock in an FX rate. The rate that you see on the website is the rate that you get. No if, ands, or buts.
  • Once you pay for your transfer, the funds will be released to the person that you’re sending money to. We have a live tracking screen where you can see the status of the transfer.

¥400 CNY

From: Dorothy Hanson

  • Processing Charge 9:36 AM

Payments delivered in under 6 hours.

WYRE

banks

Fees so fair we actually list them

Banks have had it too good for too long. They claim your transfers are fee free, all the while setting artificial exchange rates to rip you off without you even knowing.

With Wyre, you always get the true market exchange rate, and we charge a 0.75% transaction fee. Pretty simple. We think it’s the only way to do it.

How do we stack up?

Speed Fee Rate Sent
Wyre
 1 hour USD $0.00 $1 = ¥6.930
CNY ¥34,650
Midmarket
 1 hour USD $0.00 $1 = ¥6.930
CNY ¥34,314
